metadata.title: SYNGO_MF_1446
metadata.comment:
Rationale: WC recording of effect of blocking BK channel on AP.

22/11/2017 Pim
- The BL channel is channel activated by voltage and by intracellular calcium: " Whole-cell, intracellular, and field-potential recordings from CA1 pyramidal cells showed that the presynaptic BK channels are activated by calcium influx and can contribute to repolarization of the presynaptic action potential (AP) and negative feedback control of Ca2+ influx and transmitter release. " I have selected term ligand-gated ion channel ... where I considered Ca as the ligand.. Experimental description: Subjects. Male Wistar rats (Möllegaard, Ejby, Denmark) were deeply anesthetized with halothane before decapitation or fixation. Adult rats (6-10 weeks old) were used for morphological studies; 4- to 6-week-old rats were used for electrophysiology experiments. The care and use of animals were in accordance with institutional guidelines.
